allow: Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-ChildItem ''C:\\Users\\Kang Chul Ho'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, Attributes")
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-ChildItem ''C:\\Users\\Kang Chul Ho\\OneDrive'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name | Head -20")
Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "Get-ChildItem ''C:\\Users\\Kang Chul Ho'' | Where-Object { $_FullName -notlike ''*OneDrive*'' } | Select-Object Name, Attributes | Format-Table -AutoSize")
Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "Get-CimInstance Win32_PhysicalMemory | Select-Object BankLabel, Capacity, Speed, Manufacturer, PartNumber | Format-Table -AutoSize")
Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "Get-CimInstance Win32_ComputerSystem | Select-Object Manufacturer, Model, SystemFamily, SystemSKUNumber | Format-List")
